questions: what is a transformer in AI?
attention is all you need paper ki?
transformer er component gulo ki ki?
answers: Transformer is a neural network architecture that uses self-attention to process sequences in parallel. Introduced in the 'Attention Is All You Need' paper, it powers GPT, BERT, and most modern AI.
Transformer holo ekta architecture ja encoder ar decoder niye gothito. Eta self-attention use kore, RNN er moto sequential processing lage na — tai onek fast ar efficient.

Transformers revolutionized AI by processing entire sequences at once using attention mechanisms. Key components include multi-head attention, feed-forward networks, positional encoding, and layer normalization.

The transformer model replaced RNNs and LSTMs as the dominant architecture for NLP. It handles long-range dependencies better, trains faster due to parallelization, and scales well with more data and compute.
